title: DAY TREATMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: RIVERVIEW CENTER FOR GROWTH DAY TREATMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated psychiatric day treatment and specialized education services in community and public school settings. 3995 Marcola Road Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Children ages 3-12 with severe emotional, behavioral or mental, emotional disorder as determined by a mental health assessment. Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-2pm, Wednesday 9am-1pm Email (541) 726-1465 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 726-1465 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment and information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Psychiatric Day Treatment * Children Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COLLABORATIVE PROBLEM SOLVING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WELLNESS AND COMMUNITY HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - INTENSIVE SCHOOL AND COMMUNITY BASED PROGRAMS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MOBILE RESPONSE AND STABILIZATION SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
